title: France's former Socialist Prime Minister Lionel Jospin dies at 88
summary_full: Jospin was head of government from 1997 to 2002 and is credited with bringing in the 35-hour working week.
summary_public: Jospin was head of government from 1997 to 2002 and is credited with bringing in the 35-hour working week.
